name: web-frontend-testing
description: Orchestrated Playwright MCP workflow for web frontend testing: guided requirements intake, codebase surface scan, standardized test plan, per-scenario execution, and dual engineering/executive reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, run, and report Playwright MCP tests for web frontends.
interface.longDescription: User-facing orchestrator that walks a five-stage Playwright-based workflow (intake → codebase scan → plan → execute → report). It auto-detects testable surfaces from the repository, generates a standardized test-plan.yaml, runs one Playwright MCP scenario per invocation with full evidence capture, and emits both an engineering Markdown report and a self-contained accessible executive HTML summary.
defaultPrompt: Scan this repository and propose a Playwright MCP test plan for the frontend.
Run the approved scenarios against http://localhost:3000 and capture evidence.
Generate the engineering and executive reports for the latest test run.
